evals.prompt: Show total sales by region from the sales data file
evals.expected_output: Pivot table with regions as rows, sum of sales as values, sorted largest to smallest with a bar chart
expectations: Reads the source Excel file to identify columns and data types
Creates a pivot table on a new sheet with Region as row field
Sorts regions from largest to smallest sales
Adds a column or bar chart visualization
Reports top insights including which region leads and % of total

evals.prompt: Create a cross-tab of sales by region and product category
evals.expected_output: Two-dimensional pivot table with regions as rows, categories as columns, sum of sales as values
expectations: Creates a cross-tabulation with Region as rows and Category as columns
Values are Sum of Sales at each intersection
Includes row totals, column totals, and grand total
Applies conditional formatting for heatmap effect
Identifies the highest and lowest cells in the grid

evals.prompt: Show me the top 10 products by revenue with a Pareto chart
evals.expected_output: Ranked table of top 10 products with revenue, cumulative %, and Pareto visualization
expectations: Filters to top 10 products by revenue
Includes revenue amount, order count, and % of total for each product
Calculates cumulative percentage for Pareto analysis
Creates a combo chart (bar + cumulative line)
Reports concentration insight (e.g., top 10 = X% of total revenue)
